items.note: Main app consistently uses Inter (sans), Plus Jakarta Sans (headings), JetBrains Mono (mono). passwords/new.html.erb and passwords/edit.html.erb are Rails scaffold defaults using gray-400, blue-600 — inconsistent with design system.
Pages use text-xs (12px), text-sm (14px), text-lg (18px), text-2xl (24px). Most pages use 3-4 sizes. Acceptable for data-dense internal tool.

items.description: Heading hierarchy (h1 > h2 > h3 in size)
items.note: h1: text-2xl (24px), h2: text-lg/text-xl (18-20px), h3: text-sm font-semibold (14px). Consistent descending hierarchy throughout.
No explicit leading- classes on body text. Tailwind default for text-sm is line-height 1.25rem (ratio ~1.43 which is within range) but implicit. No leading-relaxed applied to paragraphs.
FAIL: text-xs (12px) used 109 times — table headers, badge labels, timestamps, meta info, audit log diffs, stat card labels, breadcrumbs. Widespread below the 14px floor.
font-bold for h1, font-semibold for h2/h3, font-medium for labels, default (400) for body. Consistent across all 43 views.

items.description: Proper text alignment (left for body, centered only for headings/CTAs)
items.note: Body text left-aligned. Numeric columns right-aligned (correct). Login forgot password link uses text-center. No inappropriate centering of paragraph text.

items.description: No orphaned headings (heading without following content)
items.note: All headings followed by content (tables, cards, forms). No orphaned headings detected.
Form pages use max-w-lg/max-w-2xl. List pages use max-w-7xl full-width with no prose width on text. Mostly tabular content so acceptable.
tracking-tight on brand logo, tracking-wide on uppercase stat labels, no tracking on body. Consistent and intentional.
uppercase only on table header <th> elements and stat card labels — both label contexts. No all-caps body text.
Document/notice lists use space-y-2 with consistent li. Error lists use list-disc list-inside. Consistent.
Dominant values: py-2 (187x), px-4 (143x), px-3 (65x), p-4 (28x) — all on Tailwind 4px scale. py-0.5 for badges is intentional micro-spacing.
Section spacing uses mb-4, mb-6, mb-8 consistently. Page headers: pb-4 mb-6. Consistent vertical rhythm.
Tables use consistent px-4 py-2.5 on all cells. Cards use grid with gap-3 or gap-6. Forms use space-y-4 or space-y-6. Solid implicit grid.
Primary buttons: px-4 py-2 or px-6 py-2. Login button: px-3.5 py-2.5. Adequate whitespace.
gap-2 (21x), gap-3 (14x), gap-4 (7x), gap-6 (4x) — consistent 4px-scale gaps. No arbitrary values.

items.description: No cramped form fields (min 8px between inputs)
items.note: Forms use space-y-4, space-y-5, or space-y-6 between inputs. Carrier data entry grid uses gap-4. All well above 8px minimum.
Cards consistently use p-4 or p-5. One minor variation: invoice column panels use p-3 vs p-4 but contextually intentional (denser data view).
All pages: mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8. Consistent responsive horizontal margins.
Nav links: space-x-4 (16px). Action buttons: gap-2 (8px). Table action links: space-x-2 (8px). At the minimum but meets the floor.
No icon library used. Navigation badges use ml-1.5. Absence of icons avoids icon-text spacing problems but also limits visual communication at the expense of scannability.

items.description: Text contrast ratio >= 4.5:1 (WCAG AA body text)
items.note: PARTIAL FAIL: slate-400 on white = 2.56:1 (muted timestamps, em dashes). teal-600 on white = 3.74:1 (all link text). white on teal-600 = 3.74:1 (primary button text). All fail 4.5:1 AA for normal-size text.
teal-600 (3.74:1) and success-600 (3.77:1) pass for large text (18px+ or 14px bold). Primary buttons and large links pass at large text threshold.
slate-300 form borders on white = approx 1.6:1 — fails 3:1 non-text threshold. teal-500 focus ring on white = 2.49:1 — also fails.
Navy (nav), teal (accent/CTA), slate (neutral), success (green), warning (amber), danger (rose), info (blue), violet (AP rare). Well-controlled for a complex financial tool.
Navy for nav, teal for CTAs and links, slate for neutral UI. Semantic colors applied correctly throughout all 43 views.

items.description: No pure black (#000) on pure white (#fff) for body text
items.note: Body text: slate-800 (#1E293B) on slate-50 (#F8FAFC). No pure black/white. Good.
Links: teal-600 with teal-800 hover — consistent. No visited state styling — visited links look identical to unvisited. Acceptable for internal tool.
danger-* (rose), success-* (emerald), warning-* (amber). Applied with perfect consistency in badges, alerts, form errors, notice backgrounds.
focus:ring-teal-500 on most inputs. teal-500 (#14B8A6) on white = 2.49:1 — below 3:1. Admin retry button has focus:ring-offset-2 which helps perception but ring contrast remains low.
Disabled: bg-slate-50, text-slate-500, border-slate-200, cursor-not-allowed. Active: bg-white, text-slate-900, border-slate-300. Clearly distinct.

items.description: Color is not sole indicator of state (shape/icon too)
items.note: Status badges use color + text label (good). Aging bucket dots are color + text label (good). Table row hover is color-only (minor). Overall adequate.

items.description: Dark mode consistency (if applicable, else skip)
items.note: No dark mode implemented. Item skipped from grade calculation.
Navigation bar at 375px contains 9 nav items in a fixed h-16 flex row with no wrapping. Will overflow horizontally. Critical mobile issue.
Tables use overflow-hidden (not overflow-x-auto). Wide tables at narrow viewports clip content rather than scrolling. Affects all major data tables.
Content area uses responsive px (px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8). Grids stack correctly at mobile. Tables and nav have no mobile breakpoint behavior.
Invoice/deal show pages use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 — stacks correctly. Carrier data entry form uses grid-cols-2 with no mobile breakpoint — won't stack.
No img tags in any view template. N/A — pass.

items.description: Tables scroll horizontally or stack on mobile
items.note: FAIL: All data tables use overflow-hidden. Zero tables use overflow-x-auto. Wide tables (8 cols Payments, 7 cols Exceptions, 8 cols Aged Receivables) clip on mobile.

items.description: Modals/dialogs fit viewport on all sizes
items.note: No custom modals. Turbo_confirm uses native browser dialog. N/A — pass.

items.description: Navigation accessible on all viewport sizes
items.note: FAIL: Fixed h-16 flex row with 9 nav items. No hamburger menu, no sm:hidden/md:flex pattern, no Stimulus controller for mobile nav. Severely broken at 375px.

items.description: Footer at page bottom (not floating mid-page)
items.note: No footer element exists. Layout has only nav + main. No copyright, version info, or support links.
Main: max-w-7xl. Forms: max-w-2xl or max-w-lg (some via w-full max-w-2xl, others via max-w-2xl mx-auto — slight inconsistency). New invoice uses max-w-lg inline.

items.description: No layout shift on page load
items.note: No lazy-loaded images or above-fold dynamic injection. Turbo Drive handles navigation. Minimal CLS risk.
No custom z-index in any view. No overlapping positioned elements. No dropdowns requiring z-index management.
All button types have hover: primary (hover:bg-teal-700), danger (hover:bg-danger-700), success (hover:bg-success-700), secondary (hover:bg-slate-200). Complete.
teal links: hover:text-teal-800. Slate links: hover:text-slate-700. Nav links: hover:text-white hover:bg-navy-700. All links have hover states.

items.description: Focus indicators visible on all interactive elements
items.note: Form inputs: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500. Most action buttons and nav links lack explicit focus: classes. Partial coverage.
FAIL: No loading spinners or disabled-during-submit states. No data-turbo-submits-with on any form. Users get no per-button feedback during form submission.

items.description: Disabled states styled distinctly from active
items.note: Disabled: bg-slate-50, text-slate-500, border-slate-200, cursor-not-allowed. Active: bg-white, border-slate-300. Clearly distinct.
Top-of-form error banner (danger-50) with bulleted error list. No field-level inline highlighting or border-red on invalid fields.
Flash notice renders success-50 green alert in layout. Consistent server-rendered success feedback.

Primary buttons: py-2 = ~36px height — below 44px. Table action links (Approve, Dismiss, Accept Match) are inline text with no padding — very small touch targets. Login button: py-2.5 = ~42px, close but under.
18 cursor-pointer usages on submit inputs. Standard links default to pointer. button_to elements used in most places lack cursor-pointer.
transition-shadow on cards, transition-colors on table rows. Tailwind defaults: 150ms ease-in-out. No custom animation causing jank.
No custom scroll handling or sticky elements causing paint issues. Standard browser scroll.

items.description: Proper tab order matches visual order
items.note: No tabindex attributes disrupting natural DOM order. No absolutely positioned content reordering visual vs DOM order.
No img tags in any view template. Favicon in <link> tags only. N/A — pass.

items.description: All form inputs have associated labels
items.note: FAIL: billing_tasks/show.html.erb carrier data entry form uses bare <label> without for= and bare <input> without id=. Visual pairing only — screen readers cannot associate them. passwords/new and passwords/edit (scaffold) also have label-less patterns. retailers/_form.html.erb and carriers/_form.html.erb use f.label which generates proper for= — those pass.
Layout has <main> and <nav> (implicit landmarks). No <footer>. Nav lacks aria-label='Primary navigation'. Partial.
FAIL: No skip-to-content link in layout. Keyboard users must tab through all 9 nav items on every page before reaching main content.
Standard HTML elements keyboard-accessible by default. Add Carrier button is a button element. Complex flows (batch approve, turbo confirmations) untested from source alone.
No custom focus management. Turbo confirm uses native browser dialog. No keyboard traps.

items.description: Screen reader announcements for dynamic content (aria-live)
items.note: FAIL: No aria-live regions anywhere. Running total display (carrier-data-entry) updates via Stimulus with no aria-live='polite'. Turbo Frame updates lack live region announcements.

items.description: Proper heading hierarchy for screen readers
items.note: Most pages: h1 > h2 > h3 correct. invoice/show.html.erb has h3 'Line Items' inside a div without a parent h2 in the AR column — level skip. Billing task show has multiple same-level h2 (acceptable).

items.description: Sufficient color contrast (verified via accessibility tree)
items.note: Same as item 23. teal-600 on white = 3.74:1 (FAIL for body text). slate-400 on white = 2.56:1 (FAIL). Link and muted text colors fail throughout.
No custom modals. Native browser dialogs (turbo_confirm) handle focus automatically. N/A — pass.

FAIL: Error messages in top-of-form banner have no aria-describedby linking to specific fields. No role='alert' on error container. Screen readers won't auto-announce or associate errors with invalid fields.
FAIL: Application layout uses <html> with no lang attribute. Public error pages (404.html, 500.html) correctly use <html lang='en'> — but the app layout omits it.

items.description: Empty states for lists/tables (not just blank)
items.note: shared/empty_state partial used on Deals, Retailers, Carriers, Payment Approvals, Exceptions, Billing Tasks, Admin Jobs, Audit Logs, Aged Receivables, Deal detail (invoices, documents, notices). Comprehensive.
FAIL: No skeleton screens or spinners. Turbo Drive provides native thin progress bar for page navigation but no per-component loading state for form submissions or batch operations.
public/500.html exists. Forms re-render with errors intact for correction. No client-side error boundary (N/A for server-rendered Rails). Recovery implicit via re-rendered form.
public/404.html exists with basic readable layout. NOT styled with app's design system (navy/teal) — uses default Rails error page inline styles. Functional but visually inconsistent.

items.description: Long text truncates gracefully (ellipsis or expand)
items.note: Deal display_name: .truncate(50) in breadcrumbs. Admin job arguments/errors: truncate at 100. Exception deal name: truncate(30). Audit entity link: truncate(20). Consistent truncation throughout.
Deals, Retailers, Carriers, Audit Logs implement pagination with Previous/Next and item count display. Page size: 20 items.

items.description: Form validation on submit AND blur
items.note: HTML5 required on login fields (on-submit native validation). Server-side validation re-renders with errors. No custom blur validation via Stimulus. Blur validation absent.

Three values in use: rounded (4px), rounded-md (6px), rounded-lg (8px). Cards=rounded-lg, inputs=rounded-md, badges=rounded-md. Some buttons use rounded (4px) while others use rounded-md (6px) — minor inconsistency on similar components.
Cards: shadow-sm default, shadow-md on hover. Tables: shadow-sm. Login: shadow-xl (intentional prominence). Revenue summary: shadow-sm. Consistent and intentional hierarchy.
public/icon.png and public/icon.svg both exist. Layout references both with rel='icon' for PNG and SVG, plus apple-touch-icon. Complete favicon setup.

qa.message: QA testing not yet performed — run /rq:qa for browser testing
